meta.description: A runbook — operational steps for a specific system event such as a deploy, incident or rollback

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_88a38444_6e6e_4817_bb41_c371c303c089" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "trigger" TEXT,
    "service" TEXT,
    "severity" TEXT,
    "owner" TEXT,
    "escalation_path" TEXT,
    "last_tested" TEXT,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_88a38444_6e6e_4817_bb41_c371c303c089" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_88a384446e6e4817_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
